<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_challenge_docs.py. -->

# SU2 medium: direct solve with restart output

Wrap the `SU2_CFD` executable and run a tiny adapted official tutorial case when it is available.

## Why This Case Exists

Some important engineering tools are too heavyweight for default CI runners, but the live suite should still pressure-test a real solver run rather than stopping at a help screen.

## Case Shape

- ID: `su2_cli`
- Family: `su2`
- Difficulty: `medium`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `command`
- Workflow Slice: `aerodynamics`
- Target Kind: `command`
- Upstream Target: `SU2_CFD`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/su2_cli/challenge.toml`

## Ingestion Breadth

This case relies on its workflow without extra breadth assertions.

## Why This Stays A Challenge

This case keeps its ingestion recipe and workflow assertions in
`challenge.toml` instead of checking in companion `ingest.py` and
`use.py` scripts. That boundary is intentional: the challenge lane
should stay a compact problem statement rather than turning into a
worked answer key like the case-study lane.

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=su2_cli
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only su2_cli
```

## Prepared Inputs

- Render `challenges/cases/su2_cli/fixtures/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg.in` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg` before the workflow runs.

## Fixtures

- `challenges/cases/su2_cli/fixtures/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg.in`
- `challenges/cases/su2_cli/fixtures/mesh_NACA0012_inv.su2`

## Workflow

### 1. Run a one-iteration SU2 direct solve on the tiny adapted tutorial case

Tool: `run_su2_cfd`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "cwd": "{challenge_artifact_dir}",
  "extra_argv": [
    "{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg"
  ]
}
```

Expectations: json fields {'exit_code': 0}; files are non-empty ['{challenge_artifact_dir}/history.csv'].

## What This Case Proves

- The challenge harness can represent heavyweight optional CLIs honestly while still driving a real workflow.
- CLI ingestion can produce a deterministic wrapper for a real SU2 solver run on specialist machines.

## Known Limits

- This case intentionally degrades to `skipped_unavailable` on machines without SU2 installed.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: run a tiny real SU2 CFD workflow without overfitting to one machine.
# This case is allowed to skip cleanly when the upstream executable is not installed.
id = "su2_cli"
title = "SU2 medium: direct solve with restart output"
tier = "local_full"
style = "command"
slice = "aerodynamics"
family = "su2"
difficulty = "medium"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the `SU2_CFD` executable and run a tiny adapted official tutorial case when it is available."
motivation = "Some important engineering tools are too heavyweight for default CI runners, but the live suite should still pressure-test a real solver run rather than stopping at a help screen."
proves = [
  "The challenge harness can represent heavyweight optional CLIs honestly while still driving a real workflow.",
  "CLI ingestion can produce a deterministic wrapper for a real SU2 solver run on specialist machines.",
]
limitations = [
  "This case intentionally degrades to `skipped_unavailable` on machines without SU2 installed.",
]

[target]
kind = "command"
value = ["SU2_CFD"]

[probe]
commands = [["SU2_CFD"]]

[scaffold]
kind = "command"
function_name = "run_su2_cfd"
help_probe_args = ["-h"]

[setup]
[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg.in"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg"

[workflow]
[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Run a one-iteration SU2 direct solve on the tiny adapted tutorial case"
tool = "run_su2_cfd"
arguments = { extra_argv = ["{challenge_artifact_dir}/inv_NACA0012_minimal.cfg"], cwd = "{challenge_artifact_dir}" }

[workflow.steps.expect]
json_fields = { exit_code = 0 }
files_nonempty = ["{challenge_artifact_dir}/history.csv"]
```
